Question:
This study aims to investigate the relationship between serum uric acid levels (mg/dl) and all-cause mortality.
We will be using NHANES data between 1999 and 2018, the analysis will employ a weighted Cox proportional hazards regression model use exam weights.
The study cohort will be composed of participants age in years at screening 20 years and older who meet the criteria for diabetes when an individual is considered to have diabetes if they reported doctor told them they have diabetes, had a glycohemoglobin A1c (HbA1c) level >= 6.5%, or a fasting plasma glucose level (mg/dl) is 126 mg/dL or greater. 
Individuals will be excluded from the analysis if their pregnancy exam was positive. Participants with missing laboratory values for serum uric acid (mg/dl), serum creatinine (mg/dl), or  glycohemoglobin (HbA1c) (%), will be excluded. Anyone who reported ever being told they had cancer or a malignancy will be excluded, as well as those missing mortality data or months followup examination, will be excluded.
The primary predictor for this analysis is the serum uric acid level (mg/dl), which will be categorized into five groups based on its distribution in the study population, using quintiles as cut-offs QN1: <20%, QN2: >=20 and <40%, QN3: >=40 and <60%, QN4: >=60 and <80%, QN5: >=80%,
The main outcome is all-cause mortality, categorized as 1 or 0, with months followup examination serving as the time-to-event variable. 
The analysis will control factors, including age in years at screening, gender, and race/Hispanic origin, which is categorized as Non-Hispanic White, Non-Hispanic Black, Mexican American or Hispanic, and Other.
Structured Question:
Analysis Type: weighted cox regression (exam)

Dataset: NHANES

Period of Interest: 1999-2018

Inclusion Criteria:
- age in years at screening >= 20
- (doctor told them they have diabetes = Yes OR glycohemoglobin A1c (HbA1c) level >= 6.5% OR fasting plasma glucose level (mg/dl) >= 126 mg/dL)

Exclusion Criteria:
- pregnancy exam = positive
- missing serum uric acid (mg/dl)
- missing serum creatinine (mg/dl)
- missing glycohemoglobin (HbA1c) (%)
- ever being told they had cancer or a malignancy = Yes
- missing all-cause mortality
- missing months followup examination

Covariates:
- age in years at screening
- gender
- race/Hispanic origin categorized as:
  Non-Hispanic White,
  Non-Hispanic Black,
  Mexican American or Hispanic,
  Other

Predictor:
- serum uric acid level (mg/dl) categorized into five groups based on quintiles:
  QN1: <20%
  QN2: >=20 and <40%
  QN3: >=40 and <60%
  QN4: >=60 and <80%
  QN5: >=80%

Outcome:
- (months followup examination, all-cause mortality)
  all-cause mortality: 1 if event occurred, 0 otherwise

-- STEP 1: Create temp_master_weight

-- TEMP TABLE FOR weight
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_weight;

CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_weight AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (full_sample_4_year_mec_exam_weight * 4.0 / 24.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.demo
WHERE full_sample_4_year_mec_exam_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (full_sample_4_year_mec_exam_weight * 4.0 / 24.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.demo_b
WHERE full_sample_4_year_mec_exam_weight IS NOT NULL

SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_fasting_glucose_mg_dl
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_pregnancy_status_at_exam
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_uric_acid_mg_dl
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_creatinine_mg_dl
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_ever_told_you_had_cancer_or_malignancy
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_mortality_status
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_months_followup_examination
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_gender
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_race_hispanic_origin;

-- Add index to the main ID table for the final join
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_all_ids_respondent_sequence_number ON temp_all_ids (respondent_sequence_number);

-- FINAL MASTER TABLE
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS final_master_table;
CREATE TABLE final_master_table AS
SELECT
    a.respondent_sequence_number,
    t0."age_in_years_at_screening",
    t1."doctor_told_you_have_diabetes",
    t2."glycohemoglobin",
    t3."fasting_glucose_mg_dl",
    t4."pregnancy_status_at_exam",
    t5."uric_acid_mg_dl",
    t6."creatinine_mg_dl",
    t7."ever_told_you_had_cancer_or_malignancy",
    t8."mortality_status",
    t9."months_followup_examination",
    t10."gender",
    t11."race_hispanic_origin"
FROM temp_all_ids a
LEFT JOIN temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening t0 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t0.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes t1 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t1.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_glycohemoglobin t2 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t2.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_fasting_glucose_mg_dl t3 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t3.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_pregnancy_status_at_exam t4 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t4.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_uric_acid_mg_dl t5 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t5.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_creatinine_mg_dl t6 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t6.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_ever_told_you_had_cancer_or_malignancy t7 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t7.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_mortality_status t8 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t8.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_months_followup_examination t9 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t9.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_gender t10 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t10.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_race_hispanic_origin t11 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t11.respondent_sequence_number;

CREATE INDEX idx_final_master_respondent_sequence_number    
    ON final_master_table (respondent_sequence_number);


-- Clean up final_master_table
DELETE FROM final_master_table
WHERE respondent_sequence_number NOT IN (
    SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM weight_design
);


-- ========== STEP 1: Inclusion ==========

-- STEP 1.1: Includes all patients age in years at screening 20 years and older
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_inclusion_step1 AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM final_master_table
WHERE "age_in_years_at_screening" >= 20;

-- STEP 1.2: From the above group, include only those who meet the criteria for diabetes
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_inclusion_step2 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_inclusion_step1 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" = 'Yes'
   OR f."glycohemoglobin" >= 6.5
   OR f."fasting_glucose_mg_dl" >= 126;

-- ========== STEP 2: Exclusions ==========

-- STEP 2.1: Exclude patients with a positive pregnancy exam
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step1 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_inclusion_step2 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."pregnancy_status_at_exam" IS NULL
   OR f."pregnancy_status_at_exam" NOT IN ('Yes, positive lab pregnancy test or self-reported pregnant at exam');

-- STEP 2.2: Exclude patients with missing serum uric acid (mg/dl)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step2 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step1 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."uric_acid_mg_dl" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.3: Exclude patients with missing serum creatinine (mg/dl)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step3 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step2 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."creatinine_mg_dl" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.4: Exclude patients with missing glycohemoglobin (HbA1c) (%)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step4 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step3 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."glycohemoglobin" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.5: Exclude patients who reported ever being told they had cancer or a malignancy
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step5 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step4 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."ever_told_you_had_cancer_or_malignancy" IS NULL
   OR f."ever_told_you_had_cancer_or_malignancy" NOT IN ('Yes');

-- STEP 2.6: Exclude patients with missing all-cause mortality data
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step6 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step5 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."mortality_status" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.7: Exclude patients with missing months followup examination data
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step7 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step6 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."months_followup_examination" IS NOT NULL;

-- ========== STEP 3: Cohort ==========

-- The final temp table in the exclusion sequence becomes temp_cohort.
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_cohort AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step7;

-- ========== STEP 4: Variables ==========

-- 4.1 Age in years at screening
-- Extract age in years at screening for the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_age_in_years_at_screening AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."age_in_years_at_screening"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.2 Gender
-- Extract gender for the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_gender AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."gender"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.3 Race/Hispanic origin
-- Map race/hispanic origin to specified categories
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_race_hispanic_origin AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE
    WHEN f."race_hispanic_origin" = 'Non-Hispanic White' THEN 'non-hispanic white'
    WHEN f."race_hispanic_origin" = 'Non-Hispanic Black' THEN 'non-hispanic black'
    WHEN f."race_hispanic_origin" IN ('Mexican American', 'Other Hispanic') THEN 'mexican american or hispanic'
    WHEN f."race_hispanic_origin" = 'Other Race - Including Multi-Racial' THEN 'other'
    ELSE NULL
  END AS "race_hispanic_origin"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.4 Serum uric acid level (mg/dl)
-- Extract raw serum uric acid levels for the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_serum_uric_acid_level_raw AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."uric_acid_mg_dl" AS "serum_uric_acid_level_mg_dl"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- Compute quintile cutoffs for serum uric acid level within cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_serum_uric_acid_level_cutoffs AS
SELECT
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.20) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "serum_uric_acid_level_mg_dl") AS q1,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.40) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "serum_uric_acid_level_mg_dl") AS q2,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.60) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "serum_uric_acid_level_mg_dl") AS q3,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.80) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "serum_uric_acid_level_mg_dl") AS q4
FROM temp_serum_uric_acid_level_raw;

-- Assign serum uric acid level to quintile groups
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_serum_uric_acid_level_quintiles AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE
    WHEN "serum_uric_acid_level_mg_dl" IS NULL THEN NULL
    WHEN "serum_uric_acid_level_mg_dl" < (SELECT q1 FROM temp_serum_uric_acid_level_cutoffs) THEN 'QN1: <20%'
    WHEN "serum_uric_acid_level_mg_dl" < (SELECT q2 FROM temp_serum_uric_acid_level_cutoffs) THEN 'QN2: >=20 and <40%'
    WHEN "serum_uric_acid_level_mg_dl" < (SELECT q3 FROM temp_serum_uric_acid_level_cutoffs) THEN 'QN3: >=40 and <60%'
    WHEN "serum_uric_acid_level_mg_dl" < (SELECT q4 FROM temp_serum_uric_acid_level_cutoffs) THEN 'QN4: >=60 and <80%'
    ELSE 'QN5: >=80%'
  END AS "serum_uric_acid_level_mg_dl"
FROM temp_serum_uric_acid_level_raw;

-- 4.5 Months followup examination
-- Extract months followup examination for the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_months_followup_examination AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."months_followup_examination"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.6 All-cause mortality
-- Map all-cause mortality to 1 or 0
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_all_cause_mortality AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE
    WHEN f."mortality_status" = 1.0 THEN '1'
    WHEN f."mortality_status" = 0.0 THEN '0'
    ELSE NULL
  END AS "all_cause_mortality"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- ========== STEP 5: Final Table ==========
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_final_table AS
SELECT
  c."respondent_sequence_number",
  age."age_in_years_at_screening",
  g."gender",
  r."race_hispanic_origin",
  sua."serum_uric_acid_level_mg_dl",
  mfe."months_followup_examination",
  acm."all_cause_mortality"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN temp_age_in_years_at_screening age ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = age."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_gender g ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = g."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_race_hispanic_origin r ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = r."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_serum_uric_acid_level_quintiles sua ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = sua."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_months_followup_examination mfe ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = mfe."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_all_cause_mortality acm ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = acm."respondent_sequence_number";

-- ========== STEP 6: View Output ==========
SELECT * FROM temp_final_table;

-- STEP: Create merged final table with design variables + in_analysis flag
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_final_with_weights;

CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_final_with_weights AS
SELECT 
    wd."respondent_sequence_number",
    wd."masked_variance_pseudo_psu",
    wd."masked_variance_pseudo_stratum",
    wd."survey_weight",
    CASE WHEN ft."respondent_sequence_number" IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS "in_analysis",
    ft."age_in_years_at_screening",
    ft."gender",
    ft."race_hispanic_origin",
    ft."serum_uric_acid_level_mg_dl",
    ft."months_followup_examination",
    ft."all_cause_mortality"
FROM weight_design wd
LEFT JOIN temp_final_table ft
  ON wd."respondent_sequence_number" = ft."respondent_sequence_number";

Question:
This study aims to investigate the relationship between serum uric acid levels (mg/dl) and all-cause mortality.
We will be using NHANES data between 1999 and 2018, the analysis will employ a weighted Cox proportional hazards regression model use exam weights.
The study cohort will be composed of participants age in years at screening 20 years and older who meet the criteria for diabetes when an individual is considered to have diabetes if they reported doctor told them they have diabetes, had a glycohemoglobin A1c (HbA1c) level >= 6.5%, or a fasting plasma glucose level (mg/dl) is 126 mg/dL or greater. 
Individuals will be excluded from the analysis if their pregnancy exam was positive. Participants with missing laboratory values for serum uric acid (mg/dl), serum creatinine (mg/dl), or  glycohemoglobin (HbA1c) (%), will be excluded. Anyone who reported ever being told they had cancer or a malignancy will be excluded, as well as those missing mortality data or months followup examination, will be excluded.
The primary predictor for this analysis is the serum uric acid level (mg/dl), which will be categorized into five groups based on its distribution in the study population, using quintiles as cut-offs QN1: <20%, QN2: >=20 and <40%, QN3: >=40 and <60%, QN4: >=60 and <80%, QN5: >=80%,
The main outcome is all-cause mortality, categorized as 1 or 0, with months followup examination serving as the time-to-event variable. 
The analysis will control factors, including age in years at screening, gender, and race/Hispanic origin, which is categorized as Non-Hispanic White, Non-Hispanic Black, Mexican American or Hispanic, and Other.
Structured Question:
Analysis Type: weighted cox regression (exam)

Dataset: NHANES

Period of Interest: 1999-2018

Inclusion Criteria:
- age in years at screening >= 20
- (doctor told them they have diabetes = Yes OR glycohemoglobin A1c (HbA1c) level >= 6.5% OR fasting plasma glucose level (mg/dl) >= 126 mg/dL)

Exclusion Criteria:
- pregnancy exam = positive
- missing serum uric acid (mg/dl)
- missing serum creatinine (mg/dl)
- missing glycohemoglobin (HbA1c) (%)
- ever being told they had cancer or a malignancy = Yes
- missing mortality data
- missing months followup examination

Covariates:
- age in years at screening
- gender
- race/Hispanic origin categorized as:
  Non-Hispanic White,
  Non-Hispanic Black,
  Mexican American or Hispanic,
  Other

Predictor:
- serum uric acid level (mg/dl) categorized into five groups based on quintiles:
  QN1: <20%
  QN2: >=20 and <40%
  QN3: >=40 and <60%
  QN4: >=60 and <80%
  QN5: >=80%

Outcome:
- time-to-event: months followup examination
- event indicator: all-cause mortality (1 or 0)

-- STEP 1: Create temp_master_weight

-- TEMP TABLE FOR weight
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_weight;

CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_weight AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (full_sample_4_year_mec_exam_weight * 4.0 / 24.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.demo
WHERE full_sample_4_year_mec_exam_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (full_sample_4_year_mec_exam_weight * 4.0 / 24.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.demo_b
WHERE full_sample_4_year_mec_exam_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight * 2.0 / 24.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.demo_c
WHERE full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight IS NOT NULL

       (full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight * 2.0 / 24.0) AS survey_weight

WHERE full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight IS NOT NULL

-- STEP 2: Create temp_psu_stratum

-- TEMP TABLE FOR PSU and Stratum
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_psu_stratum;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_psu_stratum AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo
UNION ALL

FROM nhanes.demo_h
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_i
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_j;


-- STEP 3: Create final weight+design table
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS weight_design;
CREATE TABLE weight_design AS
SELECT 
    s.respondent_sequence_number,
    s.masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
    s.masked_variance_pseudo_stratum,
    w.survey_weight
FROM temp_psu_stratum s
INNER JOIN temp_master_weight w
  ON s.respondent_sequence_number = w.respondent_sequence_number;

-- FINAL MASTER TABLE
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS final_master_table;
CREATE TABLE final_master_table AS
SELECT
    a.respondent_sequence_number,
    t0."age_in_years_at_screening",
    t1."doctor_told_you_have_diabetes",
    t2."glycohemoglobin",
    t3."fasting_glucose_mg_dl",
    t4."pregnancy_status_at_exam",
    t5."uric_acid_mg_dl",
    t6."creatinine_mg_dl",
    t7."ever_told_you_had_cancer_or_malignancy",
    t8."mortality_status",
    t9."months_followup_examination",
    t10."gender",
    t11."race_hispanic_origin"
FROM temp_all_ids a
LEFT JOIN temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening t0 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t0.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes t1 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t1.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_glycohemoglobin t2 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t2.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_fasting_glucose_mg_dl t3 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t3.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_pregnancy_status_at_exam t4 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t4.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_uric_acid_mg_dl t5 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t5.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_creatinine_mg_dl t6 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t6.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_ever_told_you_had_cancer_or_malignancy t7 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t7.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_mortality_status t8 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t8.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_months_followup_examination t9 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t9.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_gender t10 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t10.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_race_hispanic_origin t11 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t11.respondent_sequence_number;

CREATE INDEX idx_final_master_respondent_sequence_number    
    ON final_master_table (respondent_sequence_number);


-- Clean up final_master_table
DELETE FROM final_master_table
WHERE respondent_sequence_number NOT IN (
    SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM weight_design
);


-- ========== STEP 1: Inclusion ==========

-- STEP 1.1: Includes all patients age in years at screening 20 years and older
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_inclusion_step1 AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM final_master_table
WHERE "age_in_years_at_screening" >= 20;

-- STEP 1.2: Calculate raw diabetes condition
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_diabetes_condition_raw AS
SELECT
    f."respondent_sequence_number",
    (f."doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" = 'Yes' OR
     f."glycohemoglobin" >= 6.5 OR
     f."fasting_glucose_mg_dl" >= 126.0) AS "diabetes_condition_met"
FROM final_master_table f
JOIN temp_inclusion_step1 i ON f."respondent_sequence_number" = i."respondent_sequence_number";

-- STEP 1.3: From the above group, include only those who meet the criteria for diabetes
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_inclusion_step2 AS
SELECT d."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_diabetes_condition_raw d
WHERE d."diabetes_condition_met" = TRUE;

-- ========== STEP 2: Exclusions ==========

-- STEP 2.1: Exclude individuals if their pregnancy exam was positive
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step1 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_inclusion_step2 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."pregnancy_status_at_exam" IS NULL OR f."pregnancy_status_at_exam" NOT IN ('Yes, positive lab pregnancy test or self-reported pregnant at exam');

-- STEP 2.2: Exclude participants with missing laboratory values for serum uric acid (mg/dl)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step2 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step1 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."uric_acid_mg_dl" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.3: Exclude participants with missing laboratory values for serum creatinine (mg/dl)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step3 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step2 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."creatinine_mg_dl" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.4: Exclude participants with missing laboratory values for glycohemoglobin (HbA1c) (%)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step4 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step3 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."glycohemoglobin" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.5: Exclude anyone who reported ever being told they had cancer or a malignancy
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step5 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step4 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."ever_told_you_had_cancer_or_malignancy" IS NULL OR f."ever_told_you_had_cancer_or_malignancy" NOT IN ('Yes');

-- STEP 2.6: Exclude those missing mortality data
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step6 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step5 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."mortality_status" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.7: Exclude those missing months followup examination
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step7 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step6 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."months_followup_examination" IS NOT NULL;

-- ========== STEP 3: Cohort ==========

-- The final temp table in the exclusion sequence becomes temp_cohort.
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_cohort AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step7;

-- ========== STEP 4: Variables ==========

-- 4.1 Age in years at screening
-- Extract age in years at screening for cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_age_in_years_at_screening AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."age_in_years_at_screening"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.2 Gender
-- Extract gender for cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_gender AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."gender"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.3 Race/Hispanic origin
-- Map race/Hispanic origin to specified categories
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_race_hispanic_origin AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE
    WHEN f."race_hispanic_origin" = 'Non-Hispanic White' THEN 'non-hispanic white'
    WHEN f."race_hispanic_origin" = 'Non-Hispanic Black' THEN 'non-hispanic black'
    WHEN f."race_hispanic_origin" IN ('Mexican American', 'Other Hispanic') THEN 'mexican american or hispanic'
    WHEN f."race_hispanic_origin" = 'Other Race - Including Multi-Racial' THEN 'other'
    ELSE NULL
  END AS "race_hispanic_origin"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.4 Serum uric acid level (mg/dl)
-- Extract raw serum uric acid level for cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_serum_uric_acid_level_raw AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."uric_acid_mg_dl" AS "serum_uric_acid_level_mg_dl"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- Calculate quintile cutoffs for serum uric acid level within cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_serum_uric_acid_level_cutoffs AS
SELECT
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.20) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "serum_uric_acid_level_mg_dl") AS q1,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.40) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "serum_uric_acid_level_mg_dl") AS q2,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.60) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "serum_uric_acid_level_mg_dl") AS q3,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.80) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "serum_uric_acid_level_mg_dl") AS q4
FROM temp_serum_uric_acid_level_raw;

-- Assign serum uric acid level quintile group
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_serum_uric_acid_level_quintiles AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE
    WHEN "serum_uric_acid_level_mg_dl" IS NULL THEN NULL
    WHEN "serum_uric_acid_level_mg_dl" < (SELECT q1 FROM temp_serum_uric_acid_level_cutoffs) THEN 'QN1: <20%'
    WHEN "serum_uric_acid_level_mg_dl" < (SELECT q2 FROM temp_serum_uric_acid_level_cutoffs) THEN 'QN2: >=20 and <40%'
    WHEN "serum_uric_acid_level_mg_dl" < (SELECT q3 FROM temp_serum_uric_acid_level_cutoffs) THEN 'QN3: >=40 and <60%'
    WHEN "serum_uric_acid_level_mg_dl" < (SELECT q4 FROM temp_serum_uric_acid_level_cutoffs) THEN 'QN4: >=60 and <80%'
    ELSE 'QN5: >=80%'
  END AS "serum_uric_acid_level_mg_dl"
FROM temp_serum_uric_acid_level_raw;

-- 4.5 Months followup examination
-- Extract months followup examination for cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_months_followup_examination AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."months_followup_examination"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.6 All-cause mortality
-- Map all-cause mortality to 1 or 0
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_all_cause_mortality AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE
    WHEN f."mortality_status" = 1.0 THEN 1
    WHEN f."mortality_status" = 0.0 THEN 0
    ELSE NULL
  END AS "all_cause_mortality"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- ========== STEP 5: Final Table ==========
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_final_table AS
SELECT
  c."respondent_sequence_number",
  age."age_in_years_at_screening",
  g."gender",
  r."race_hispanic_origin",
  sua."serum_uric_acid_level_mg_dl",
  mfe."months_followup_examination",
  acm."all_cause_mortality"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN temp_age_in_years_at_screening age ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = age."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_gender g ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = g."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_race_hispanic_origin r ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = r."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_serum_uric_acid_level_quintiles sua ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = sua."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_months_followup_examination mfe ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = mfe."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_all_cause_mortality acm ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = acm."respondent_sequence_number";

-- ========== STEP 6: View Output ==========
SELECT * FROM temp_final_table;

-- STEP: Create merged final table with design variables + in_analysis flag
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_final_with_weights;

CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_final_with_weights AS
SELECT 
    wd."respondent_sequence_number",
    wd."masked_variance_pseudo_psu",
    wd."masked_variance_pseudo_stratum",
    wd."survey_weight",
    CASE WHEN ft."respondent_sequence_number" IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS "in_analysis",
    ft."age_in_years_at_screening",
    ft."gender",
    ft."race_hispanic_origin",
    ft."serum_uric_acid_level_mg_dl",
    ft."months_followup_examination",
    ft."all_cause_mortality"
FROM weight_design wd
LEFT JOIN temp_final_table ft
  ON wd."respondent_sequence_number" = ft."respondent_sequence_number";

Question:
This study aims to investigate the relationship between serum uric acid levels (mg/dl) and all-cause mortality.
We will be using NHANES data between 1999 and 2018, the analysis will employ a weighted Cox proportional hazards regression model use exam weights.
The study cohort will be composed of participants age in years at screening 20 years and older who meet the criteria for diabetes when an individual is considered to have diabetes if they reported doctor told them they have diabetes, had a glycohemoglobin A1c (HbA1c) level >= 6.5%, or a fasting plasma glucose level (mg/dl) is 126 mg/dL or greater. 
Individuals will be excluded from the analysis if their pregnancy exam was positive. Participants with missing laboratory values for serum uric acid (mg/dl), serum creatinine (mg/dl), or  glycohemoglobin (HbA1c) (%), will be excluded. Anyone who reported ever being told they had cancer or a malignancy will be excluded, as well as those missing mortality data or months followup examination, will be excluded.
The primary predictor for this analysis is the serum uric acid level (mg/dl), which will be categorized into five groups based on its distribution in the study population, using quintiles as cut-offs QN1: <20%, QN2: >=20 and <40%, QN3: >=40 and <60%, QN4: >=60 and <80%, QN5: >=80%,
The main outcome is all-cause mortality, categorized as 1 or 0, with months followup examination serving as the time-to-event variable. 
The analysis will control factors, including age in years at screening, gender, and race/Hispanic origin, which is categorized as Non-Hispanic White, Non-Hispanic Black, Mexican American or Hispanic, and Other.
Structured Question:
Analysis Type: weighted cox regression (exam)

Dataset: NHANES

Period of Interest: 1999-2018

Inclusion Criteria:
- age in years at screening >= 20
- (doctor told them they have diabetes = Yes OR glycohemoglobin A1c (HbA1c) level >= 6.5% OR fasting plasma glucose level (mg/dl) >= 126 mg/dL)

Exclusion Criteria:
- pregnancy exam = positive
- missing serum uric acid (mg/dl)
- missing serum creatinine (mg/dl)
- missing glycohemoglobin (HbA1c) (%)
- ever being told they had cancer or a malignancy = Yes
- missing all-cause mortality
- missing months followup examination

Covariates:
- age in years at screening
- gender
- race/Hispanic origin categorized as:
  Non-Hispanic White,
  Non-Hispanic Black,
  Mexican American or Hispanic,
  Other

Predictor:
- serum uric acid level (mg/dl) categorized into five groups based on quintiles:
  QN1: <20%
  QN2: >=20 and <40%
  QN3: >=40 and <60%
  QN4: >=60 and <80%
  QN5: >=80%

Outcome:
- (months followup examination, all-cause mortality)
  all-cause mortality: 1 if event occurred, 0 otherwise

-- STEP 1: Create temp_master_weight

-- TEMP TABLE FOR weight
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_weight;

CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_weight AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (full_sample_4_year_mec_exam_weight * 4.0 / 24.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.demo
WHERE full_sample_4_year_mec_exam_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (full_sample_4_year_mec_exam_weight * 4.0 / 24.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.demo_b
WHERE full_sample_4_year_mec_exam_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight * 2.0 / 24.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.demo_c
WHERE full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL

       (full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight * 2.0 / 24.0) AS survey_weight

WHERE full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight IS NOT NULL

       (full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight * 2.0 / 24.0) AS survey_weight

WHERE full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight IS NOT NULL

       (full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight * 2.0 / 24.0) AS survey_weight

       (full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight * 2.0 / 24.0) AS survey_weight

-- STEP 2: Create temp_psu_stratum

-- TEMP TABLE FOR PSU and Stratum
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_psu_stratum;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_psu_stratum AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_b
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_c
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_d
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number,

       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum

UNION ALL

       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum

UNION ALL

UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_h
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_i
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_j;


-- STEP 3: Create final weight+design table
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS weight_design;
CREATE TABLE weight_design AS
SELECT 
    s.respondent_sequence_number,
    s.masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
    s.masked_variance_pseudo_stratum,
    w.survey_weight
FROM temp_psu_stratum s
INNER JOIN temp_master_weight w
  ON s.respondent_sequence_number = w.respondent_sequence_number;

-- FINAL MASTER TABLE
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS final_master_table;
CREATE TABLE final_master_table AS
SELECT
    a.respondent_sequence_number,
    t0."age_in_years_at_screening",
    t1."doctor_told_you_have_diabetes",
    t2."glycohemoglobin",
    t3."fasting_glucose_mg_dl",
    t4."pregnancy_status_at_exam",
    t5."uric_acid_mg_dl",
    t6."creatinine_mg_dl",
    t7."ever_told_you_had_cancer_or_malignancy",
    t8."mortality_status",
    t9."months_followup_examination",
    t10."gender",
    t11."race_hispanic_origin"
FROM temp_all_ids a
LEFT JOIN temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening t0 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t0.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes t1 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t1.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_glycohemoglobin t2 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t2.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_fasting_glucose_mg_dl t3 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t3.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_pregnancy_status_at_exam t4 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t4.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_uric_acid_mg_dl t5 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t5.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_creatinine_mg_dl t6 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t6.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_ever_told_you_had_cancer_or_malignancy t7 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t7.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_mortality_status t8 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t8.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_months_followup_examination t9 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t9.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_gender t10 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t10.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_race_hispanic_origin t11 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t11.respondent_sequence_number;

CREATE INDEX idx_final_master_respondent_sequence_number    
    ON final_master_table (respondent_sequence_number);


-- Clean up final_master_table
DELETE FROM final_master_table
WHERE respondent_sequence_number NOT IN (
    SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM weight_design
);


-- ========== STEP 1: Inclusion ==========

-- STEP 1.1: Includes all patients age in years at screening 20 years and older
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_inclusion_step1 AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM final_master_table
WHERE "age_in_years_at_screening" >= 20;

-- STEP 1.2: From the above group, include only those who meet diabetes diagnosis criteria
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_inclusion_step2 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_inclusion_step1 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" = 'Yes'
   OR f."glycohemoglobin" >= 6.5
   OR f."fasting_glucose_mg_dl" >= 126;

-- ========== STEP 2: Exclusions ==========

-- STEP 2.1: Exclude patients with positive pregnancy exam
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step1 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_inclusion_step2 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."pregnancy_status_at_exam" IS NULL
   OR f."pregnancy_status_at_exam" NOT IN ('Yes, positive lab pregnancy test or self-reported pregnant at exam');

-- STEP 2.2: Exclude patients with missing serum uric acid (mg/dl)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step2 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step1 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."uric_acid_mg_dl" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.3: Exclude patients with missing serum creatinine (mg/dl)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step3 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step2 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."creatinine_mg_dl" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.4: Exclude patients with missing glycohemoglobin (HbA1c) (%)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step4 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step3 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."glycohemoglobin" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.5: Exclude patients who reported ever being told they had cancer or a malignancy
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step5 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step4 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."ever_told_you_had_cancer_or_malignancy" IS NULL
   OR f."ever_told_you_had_cancer_or_malignancy" NOT IN ('Yes');

-- STEP 2.6: Exclude patients with missing all-cause mortality data
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step6 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step5 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."mortality_status" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.7: Exclude patients with missing months followup examination data
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step7 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step6 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."months_followup_examination" IS NOT NULL;

-- ========== STEP 3: Cohort ==========

-- The final temp table in the exclusion sequence becomes temp_cohort.
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_cohort AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step7;

-- ========== STEP 4: Variables ==========

-- 4.1 Age in years at screening
-- Extract age in years at screening for the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_age_in_years_at_screening AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."age_in_years_at_screening"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.2 Gender
-- Extract gender for the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_gender AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."gender"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.3 Race/Hispanic origin
-- Map race/hispanic origin to specified categories
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_race_hispanic_origin AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE
    WHEN f."race_hispanic_origin" = 'Non-Hispanic White' THEN 'non-hispanic white'
    WHEN f."race_hispanic_origin" = 'Non-Hispanic Black' THEN 'non-hispanic black'
    WHEN f."race_hispanic_origin" IN ('Mexican American', 'Other Hispanic') THEN 'mexican american or hispanic'
    WHEN f."race_hispanic_origin" = 'Other Race - Including Multi-Racial' THEN 'other'
    ELSE NULL
  END AS "race_hispanic_origin"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.4 Serum uric acid level (mg/dl)
-- Extract raw serum uric acid level for the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_serum_uric_acid_level_raw AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."uric_acid_mg_dl" AS "serum_uric_acid_level_mg_dl"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- Compute quintile cutoffs for serum uric acid level within cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_serum_uric_acid_level_cutoffs AS
SELECT
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.20) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "serum_uric_acid_level_mg_dl") AS q1,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.40) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "serum_uric_acid_level_mg_dl") AS q2,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.60) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "serum_uric_acid_level_mg_dl") AS q3,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.80) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "serum_uric_acid_level_mg_dl") AS q4
FROM temp_serum_uric_acid_level_raw;

-- Assign serum uric acid level to quintile groups
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_serum_uric_acid_level_quintiles AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE
    WHEN "serum_uric_acid_level_mg_dl" IS NULL THEN NULL
    WHEN "serum_uric_acid_level_mg_dl" < (SELECT q1 FROM temp_serum_uric_acid_level_cutoffs) THEN 'QN1: <20%'
    WHEN "serum_uric_acid_level_mg_dl" < (SELECT q2 FROM temp_serum_uric_acid_level_cutoffs) THEN 'QN2: >=20 and <40%'
    WHEN "serum_uric_acid_level_mg_dl" < (SELECT q3 FROM temp_serum_uric_acid_level_cutoffs) THEN 'QN3: >=40 and <60%'
    WHEN "serum_uric_acid_level_mg_dl" < (SELECT q4 FROM temp_serum_uric_acid_level_cutoffs) THEN 'QN4: >=60 and <80%'
    ELSE 'QN5: >=80%'
  END AS "serum_uric_acid_level_mg_dl"
FROM temp_serum_uric_acid_level_raw;

-- 4.5 Months followup examination
-- Extract months followup examination for the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_months_followup_examination AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."months_followup_examination"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.6 All-cause mortality
-- Map all-cause mortality to 1 or 0
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_all_cause_mortality AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE f."mortality_status"
    WHEN 1.0 THEN 1
    WHEN 0.0 THEN 0
    ELSE NULL
  END AS "all_cause_mortality"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- ========== STEP 5: Final Table ==========
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_final_table AS
SELECT
  c."respondent_sequence_number",
  age."age_in_years_at_screening",
  g."gender",
  r."race_hispanic_origin",
  sua."serum_uric_acid_level_mg_dl",
  mfe."months_followup_examination",
  acm."all_cause_mortality"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN temp_age_in_years_at_screening age ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = age."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_gender g ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = g."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_race_hispanic_origin r ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = r."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_serum_uric_acid_level_quintiles sua ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = sua."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_months_followup_examination mfe ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = mfe."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_all_cause_mortality acm ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = acm."respondent_sequence_number";

-- ========== STEP 6: View Output ==========
SELECT * FROM temp_final_table;

-- STEP: Create merged final table with design variables + in_analysis flag
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_final_with_weights;

CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_final_with_weights AS
SELECT 
    wd."respondent_sequence_number",
    wd."masked_variance_pseudo_psu",
    wd."masked_variance_pseudo_stratum",
    wd."survey_weight",
    CASE WHEN ft."respondent_sequence_number" IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS "in_analysis",
    ft."age_in_years_at_screening",
    ft."gender",
    ft."race_hispanic_origin",
    ft."serum_uric_acid_level_mg_dl",
    ft."months_followup_examination",
    ft."all_cause_mortality"
FROM weight_design wd
LEFT JOIN temp_final_table ft
  ON wd."respondent_sequence_number" = ft."respondent_sequence_number";
